Shared Savings Program — Accountable Care Organizations (SSP ACO)
Beneficiary File
Version — January 2026
Variable/SAS name SAS Label Long description Type Length Time period 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 2019-A3 2020-2021 2022 2023-2026
BENE_ID Encrypted 723 Beneficiary ID The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary. The CCW assigns a unique beneficiary identification number to each individual who receives Medicare and/or Medicaid, and uses that number to identify an individual’s records
